answer:
The poem is "A Far Cry from Africa" by Derek Walcott, who was of Saint Lucian, African, and European descent. The line "Why are the senators sitting there without legislating?" appears in this poem, which ends by calling the title group "a kind of solution." Walcott's ethnicity is most commonly described as Afro-Caribbean or Saint Lucian.

\boxed{Afro-Caribbean}
